# Vendor Markdown References

These files are LLM-extracted Markdown references derived from the vendor PDFs in `docs/vendor/`.

They are intentionally shorter and more structured than the original PDFs so an LLM can use them as working reference material during implementation and review.

## Files

- `PSP11704.md`: product specification for Sunrise `006-0-0007`
- `TDE7318.md`: integration guidance for Sunrise and Sunlight
- `TDE5531.md`: `I2C` protocol, registers, and host-side state handling

## Source PDFs

- `PSP11704.pdf`
- `TDE7318.pdf`
- `TDE5531.pdf`

## Notes

- The Markdown files are the preferred LLM-facing references.
- The PDFs remain the source of record if a detail is missing from the Markdown.
